title: Croparium: Confluence Otherworld
description: A mod that makes it possible to farm minerals from Confluence: Otherworld.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20c5887e0cba0c55763cdc3f7a100b9e57e94fac.png)

Two required dependencies : [**Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium) (Ore Farming Tech Provider) and [**Confluence: Otherworld**](https://modrinth.com/mod/confluence).

This mod adds farming functionality for 28 types of minerals from "Confluence: Otherworld" ,  providing players with a more flexible mineral collection experience. 


Most of the Confluence ore crops can be grown on dedicated farmland in the Overworld: simply hold any type of pickaxe (whether it’s a wooden pickaxe, stone pickaxe, or a more advanced one) in your right hand, then right-click on common stones in the Overworld (such as deepslate, cobblestone, andesite, granite, diorite, etc.)—this will convert the stones into suitable farmland for the ore crops.

The hydration rule for these Overworld farms is similar to that of vanilla wheat farms: a water source must be placed within 4 horizontal blocks of the farmland. Otherwise, the farmland will turn back to stones.​

As a special ore native to the Nether, Obsidian Ore requires dedicated farmland adapted to the Nether environment. To cultivate it, hold any pickaxe in your main hand and right-click on blackstone or basalt in the Nether. Additionally, Nether farmland does not require water for hydration; instead, lava is used as a replacement. Simply place a lava block within 4 horizontal blocks of the farmland, and this will meet the growth requirements of the Obsidian Ore crops.​

For details such as the method of obtaining seeds for the 28 mineral types, specific planting steps, and details about crop growth stages, we recommend referring to [**Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium). 

![Growable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5430b9f4aeded34598c30a7384495b143e26beb7.png)
